Step: Enrolled in Wave-2 Novel Technologies sub-study
Definition: All participants with any Wave-2 Fitbit session in the cohort manifest.

Step: Met ≥3 valid wear days (4-of-4 quadrant rule)
Definition: ≥3 days with ≥600 non-zero HR minutes AND HR coverage in all four 6-h quadrants.
Valid days / calendar span from first to last valid day ≥ 0.50 (Damme et al., 2024).
Per-participant mixed-effects single-component cosinor fit converged.
